stemHtml: In the take-off climb segment, a MEP aircraft has a gross gradient of 13% with all engines operating and a gross gradient of 5.2% with one engine inoperative. Which net gradients must be used for the calculation of obstacle clearance if the cloud base is at 600 ft?

options.a: 13% below the cloud base and 5.2% above.
options.b: 10% below the cloud base and 4% above.
options.c: 13% below the cloud base and 4% above.
options.d: 10% below the cloud base and 5.2% above.​​​​
